channel.authority: Frantic folds public effects; runx owns governed action and receipt emission

bounty.title: Author a useful non-connector runx skill, or overlay an open one
bounty.description:
Author a useful non-connector runx skill, or overlay an open one

Either a standalone governed skill (no external connector) that is genuinely useful, or an overlay-generator overlay of a real open skill. Connectors (external SaaS via Nango) are a separate job. Format: runx.ai/SKILL.md; scaffold with npm create @runxhq/skill@latest <name> or runx new <name>; publish to the runx registry per runx.ai/x/publish.

Deliverable: A genuinely useful standalone governed skill (or a real overlay) published to the runx registry, with a complete X.yaml (at least one governed action with typed inputs and outputs, declared scopes and policy, and emits) and a real passing harness fixture, plus a source repo.

Acceptance:
- Complete X.yaml: at least one governed action with typed inputs and outputs, declared scopes/policy, and emits, not a stub.
- A real harness fixture (X.yaml harness.cases) that exercises the action end to end and seals; captured output required.
- Genuinely useful, not a no-op echo; not a connector (no external SaaS auth).
- If an overlay, names the upstream skill and pins the digest.
- Published to the registry (community tier); the live listing is a required artifact.

**Bar — rejected if any of these:**
- Not submitted to runx as a real skill via a PR. The PR link is a required artifact.
- A connector that uses external SaaS auth. This bounty is non-connector only.
- No resolvable sealed receipt from a passing run, or a stub or no-op skill.

events.text: #10 · Author a useful non-connector runx skill, or overlay an open one

#10 · Rejected. The delivered gist is a link-checker skill that is not published (404 on the registry), and the skill you did publish is a Plausible Analytics connector. This bounty is explicitly for a non-connector skill; a SaaS connector does not count. The X.yaml declares no scopes, policy, outputs, or emits, and there is no sealed harness output. Submit a useful non-connector governed skill with typed outputs, scopes, policy, emits, a real sealed harness run, and submit it to runx as a real skill via PR. · quality 1/5 poor
